description: You are a marketing manager creating a customer retention strategy. Using the data in 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\superstore_orders.csv', develop a Power BI report that segments customers based on their last purchase date relative to a reference date of December 31, 2017. The report must include a calculated table named 'Customer_Profiles' containing Customer ID, Customer Name, and Last_Purchase_Date, with a relationship established to the main orders table. Include a 'Recency_Days' calculated column measuring days since the last purchase relative to 12/31/2017 and a 'Status' column segmenting customers into '1. Active' (Recency <= 90), '2. At Risk' (Recency 91-270), and '3. Lost' (Recency > 270). On a report page named 'Retention Strategy', provide a donut chart showing the count of customers by Status and a table visual displaying Customer Name, Recency_Days, and Status. Filter the table visual to show only '3. Lost' customers. Save the final report as 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Customer_Retention.pbix' and export the filtered list of lost customers to 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\lost_customers.csv'.
